description: Synthetic benign SMS templates for LoRA training. Disjoint from chakravyuh-bench-v0 test set. Covers 7 categories of legitimate Indian SMS traffic: banking, delivery, utility, insurance/govt, subscription, OTP-delivery, misc services.
source: hand-written, inspired by real SMS shortcode formats but using distinct transaction IDs, amounts, and wording from benchmark scenarios
